scenarios.task: Notepad: open application, write text, read text back, verify

actions.reason: process created and application window detected
executed through Microsoft UI Automation patterns

scenarios.task: Calculator: open application, calculate 1 + 2, observe result

actions.reason: supports process lifecycle through Win32 APIs
errors: No application window detected for process 18740
Calculator launch did not produce an observed application window.
notes: Windows Calculator may spawn through an app container with a different window process.

scenarios.task: File workflow: create text, save file, verify existence
notes: This scenario validates the existing file facade.
File actions are not yet represented as ActionGraph actions in version 0.1.

stable: Notepad E2E path exercises Win32 launch, UIA observation, UIA ValuePattern, and verification.
File facade can create/read/verify files within a configured root.
known_issues: Calculator may fail because modern Windows Calculator can use app-container/window process indirection.
File workflow is not yet modeled as ActionGraph actions.
No fallback backend is implemented when UIA ValuePattern is unavailable.
recommended_improvements: Add file actions after validation if file workflows need action telemetry.
Improve error quality by reporting failed action, pattern, fallback candidates, and selected backend.
Run Notepad reliability 10 times and record pass rate/duration distribution.
